all.en: Subject: Introducing the 2026 Wellbeing@Work Program
all.zh: 主旨：2026 Wellbeing@Work 員工健康方案上線

all.en: Dear Team,
all.zh: 親愛的同仁，

all.en: We are excited to announce our new employee wellness initiative.
all.zh: 我們很高興宣布全新的員工健康促進方案。

all.en: The program will officially launch on Monday, June 8th.
all.zh: 本方案將於 6 月 8 日星期一正式啟動。

all.en: Our goal is to support both physical and mental health at work.
all.zh: 我們的目標是支持員工在職場上的身心健康。

all.en: Participation is completely voluntary and free of charge.
all.zh: 參與完全為自願性質且免費。

all.en: The first pillar is our Monthly Walking Challenge.
all.zh: 第一項主軸是每月步行挑戰活動。

all.en: Employees can join teams of four to log daily steps.
all.zh: 員工可組成四人小隊，記錄每日步數。

all.en: Top three teams will receive gift vouchers each month.
all.zh: 每月前三名隊伍將獲得禮券獎勵。

all.en: You may register through the HR portal starting next week.
all.zh: 您可從下週起透過 HR 入口網站報名。

all.en: The second pillar focuses on weekly yoga sessions.
all.zh: 第二項主軸著重於每週瑜珈課程。

all.en: Classes will be held every Tuesday and Thursday at noon.
all.zh: 課程將於每週二、四中午舉行。

all.en: Sessions take place in Conference Room B on the fifth floor.
all.zh: 上課地點為五樓 B 會議室。

all.en: A certified instructor will lead beginner-friendly routines.
all.zh: 由合格教練帶領適合初學者的課程。

all.en: Please bring your own mat or borrow one at the entrance.
all.zh: 請自備瑜珈墊，或於入口處借用。

all.en: The third pillar offers confidential mental health counseling.
all.zh: 第三項主軸提供保密的心理諮商服務。

all.en: Our partner clinic provides up to six free sessions per year.
all.zh: 合作診所每年提供最多六次免費諮商。

all.en: Appointments can be booked online without manager approval.
all.zh: 預約可線上完成，無需主管核准。

all.en: All conversations remain strictly between you and the counselor.
all.zh: 所有談話內容嚴格保密於您與諮商師之間。

all.en: We believe mental wellbeing is just as important as physical health.
all.zh: 我們相信心理健康與生理健康同等重要。

all.en: In addition, we will host quarterly health screenings.
all.zh: 此外，我們將舉辦每季健康檢查活動。

all.en: Basic checks include blood pressure, cholesterol, and vision tests.
all.zh: 基本檢查包含血壓、膽固醇與視力檢測。

all.en: Screenings will be conducted by licensed medical staff onsite.
all.zh: 檢查將由合格醫護人員於現場進行。

all.en: Sign-up sheets will be available outside the HR office.
all.zh: 報名表將張貼於 HR 辦公室外。

all.en: Results will be delivered confidentially via sealed envelope.
all.zh: 檢查結果將以密封信封保密送達。

all.en: We are also introducing standing desks for interested employees.
all.zh: 我們也為有興趣的員工引進站立式辦公桌。

all.en: Please submit your request to the facilities team by June 15th.
all.zh: 請於 6 月 15 日前向總務組提出申請。

all.en: Allocation will follow a first-come, first-served basis.
all.zh: 分配將依先申請先取得原則辦理。

all.en: Ergonomic chairs are also available upon medical recommendation.
all.zh: 如有醫療建議，亦可申請人體工學椅。

all.en: Our healthy snack station will reopen with fresh fruit daily.
all.zh: 我們的健康點心區將重新開放，每日提供新鮮水果。

all.en: The pantry now stocks low-sugar drinks and nuts.
all.zh: 茶水間也備有低糖飲品與堅果。

all.en: Vending machines have been updated with healthier options.
all.zh: 自動販賣機已更新為更健康的選項。

all.en: We encourage everyone to take short breaks during the day.
all.zh: 我們鼓勵大家在白天適度休息。

all.en: Stretching reminders will appear on your computer hourly.
all.zh: 電腦每小時將跳出伸展提醒。

all.en: Walking meetings are encouraged whenever possible.
all.zh: 鼓勵以行走會議取代固定坐姿會議。

all.en: Managers are asked to support flexible breaks for participants.
all.zh: 請主管支持參與員工的彈性休息時間。

all.en: A wellness fair will be held in the main lobby on June 20th.
all.zh: 員工健康博覽會將於 6 月 20 日於大廳舉行。

all.en: Local vendors will offer samples, demonstrations, and consultations.
all.zh: 在地廠商將提供試吃、示範與諮詢服務。

all.en: Activities include massage chairs, smoothies, and mindfulness booths.
all.zh: 活動內容包含按摩椅、果昔與正念體驗區。

all.en: Attendance counts toward your wellness participation points.
all.zh: 出席可累積您的健康活動參與點數。

all.en: Points can be redeemed for branded merchandise later this year.
all.zh: 點數可於今年稍晚兌換公司紀念品。

all.en: We will share monthly newsletters with tips and program updates.
all.zh: 我們將發行每月電子報，分享建議與方案更新。

all.en: Feedback can be submitted through the anonymous survey link.
all.zh: 回饋意見可透過匿名問卷連結提交。

all.en: Your suggestions will directly shape future program offerings.
all.zh: 您的建議將直接影響未來方案內容。

all.en: Wellness champions from each department will help coordinate events.
all.zh: 各部門將指派健康大使協助活動籌辦。

all.en: If you are interested in this role, please email Sarah in HR.
all.zh: 若您有意擔任此角色，請來信 HR 部門的 Sarah。

all.en: Training for champions will be provided in early July.
all.zh: 大使培訓將於七月初提供。

all.en: Information sessions will be held on June 4th and June 5th.
all.zh: 說明會將於 6 月 4 日與 5 日舉行。

all.en: Both sessions will be recorded for those unable to attend.
all.zh: 兩場說明會皆會錄影供無法出席者觀看。

all.en: Please review the attached brochure for detailed schedules.
all.zh: 請參閱附件手冊以了解詳細時程。

all.en: A full FAQ document is also available on the intranet.
all.zh: 完整的常見問題文件亦已上傳至內部網站。

all.en: We hope you will take full advantage of these new resources.
all.zh: 我們希望您能充分運用這些新資源。

all.en: Thank you for being part of our wellness journey.
all.zh: 感謝您加入我們的健康旅程。

all.en: Warm regards,
all.zh: 致上誠摯問候，

all.en: Human Resources Department
all.zh: 人力資源部 敬上
